sentence: Less than 3 percent of the world's water is fresh, and most of __17__ is trapped in polar ice or buried underground in springs too deep to reach.
explanation: 空格代替前面提到的不可數名詞 water（單數），most of it 表示「其中大部分」。which 需要關係子句結構，what 不構成完整名詞子句，them 是複數代名詞跟 water 不一致。

sentence: Even __19__ supplies are sufficient or plentiful, they are increasingly at risk due to various forms of pollution.
explanation: Even where 表示「即使在（供給）充足的地方」，where 引導地方副詞子句，呼應後文談論水資源分布的語境。how／why／what 都無法引導這種讓步語意的子句。

sentence: Fierce national competition __20__ water resources has prompted fears that water issues contain the seeds of violent conflict.
explanation: 【搭配】competition for + 資源，表示「爭奪／競逐某資源」；with／to／at 都不是 competition 常見的搭配介系詞。

sentence: Each of the six science Olympiads __22__ its specific aims.
explanation: Each of + 複數名詞，主詞中心語是單數的 each，動詞須用單數 has；不受介系詞片語裡的複數 Olympiads 影響。have／are 用於複數主詞，is 語意不合（此處需要「擁有」的動詞而非be動詞）。

sentence: The purpose of the rally was to ask fans to respect the copyright and to stop buying __26__ CDs.
explanation: 過去分詞 pirated 作形容詞修飾 CDs，表示「被盜版的CD」（被動關係——CD是被盜版製作出來的）。pirating（現在分詞，主動語意不合，CD不會主動盜版）、pirate／piracy 是名詞或動詞原形，不能直接修飾名詞。

sentence: After signing million-dollar contracts with recording companies, singers devote most of their time __28__ their music perfect while companies are busy commercializing their products.
explanation: 【句型】devote + 時間/心力 + to + Ving，是固定搭配，表示「把時間投入在……」；make their music perfect（使音樂完美）用 making 呼應 to 之後的動名詞形式。其餘選項的動詞搭配（doing／singing／playing）都無法接續「perfect」形成合理語意。

sentence: There is, __16__, only a limited amount of water on the planet.
explanation: In fact（事實上）作插入語，用來強調、澄清前文說法，符合語境（強調地球水資源有限這個事實）。meanwhile（同時）、besides（此外）、for example（例如）都不符合這種「強調事實」的插入語氣。

sentence: Any IMO contest brings not only young mathematicians together but also their instructors; __25__, the IMO has its final aim to create opportunities for the exchange of information on math schedules and practice throughout the world.
explanation: 分號後延續前句邏輯：正因為比賽把數學家和指導老師聚在一起，「因此」IMO的終極目標就是促成資訊交流，therefore 表順接因果。whereas（然而，對比）、nevertheless（然而，轉折）、likewise（同樣地）都不符合這裡的順接因果語氣。

sentence: It is the fans that support the kingdoms of the recording companies; __29__, the industry never gives its feedback to the fans—by lowering the prices of CDs.
explanation: 前後句語意對比：「粉絲支撐了唱片公司的王國」vs「業界卻從未回饋粉絲」，however 表達這種轉折對比。indeed（確實）、hence（因此，因果）、furthermore（此外，累加）都不符合這裡「前後對比」的邏輯。

sentence: __27__ steel construction, buildings could then have a great many stories.
explanation: With 表示「藉由／有了……」，With steel construction（有了鋼構工法）符合「因為有這項技術，建築物才能蓋很多層樓」的因果邏輯。In／For／Beside 都無法表達這種「憑藉某條件」的語意。

sentence: Therefore, to make tall buildings more accessible to their users, the elevator __29__ .
explanation: electric elevator 是「被發明」的對象（被動關係），且敘述historical past事件用簡單過去式被動語態 was invented；invented（主動語態，語意錯誤——電梯不會主動發明）、had invented／would have invented 都是主動語態，也不符合這裡單純敘述過去發生的事實。

sentence: The survey __22__ indicated that 45 percent of the school children read at least five books every month; __23__ 45 percent of them read less than three per month.
explanation: further 作副詞表示「進一步（指出）」，用來承接、補充調查的另一項發現；thus（因此，因果）、otherwise（否則）、for instance（例如）都不符合這裡「補充說明調查結果」的語意。

sentence: The survey __22__ indicated that 45 percent of the school children read at least five books every month; __23__ 45 percent of them read less than three per month.
explanation: 【句型】another + 數量／百分比，表示「另外的（一群）」，another 45 percent（另外45%的人）是固定用法；other 需接複數名詞或用在the other，others'／the other's 是所有格形式，都不符合這裡直接修飾百分比數字的語法位置。

sentence: These materials, __24__ , were undreamed of in the 18th century.
explanation: 插入語 however 表示語意上的轉折對比（這些材料在現代很普遍，然而在18世紀卻是想像不到的），符合「今昔對比」的語境；finally（最後）、in addition（此外）、as a result（因此）都不符合這種轉折對比的語氣。

sentence: __26__ its strength, steel soon became a useful building material.
explanation: Because of its strength（因為它的強度）符合因果邏輯——鋼因為強度高，所以成為實用的建材。Prior to（在……之前）、In spite of（儘管）、Not to mention（更不用說）都不符合這裡的因果語意。

sentence: Some environmental scientists suggest turning newspapers __16__ charcoal.
explanation: 【句型】turn A into B 固定搭配，表示「把A轉變成B」；for／off／upon 都不是 turn 表達「轉變」的正確搭配介系詞。

sentence: This can be done by soaking sheets of newspaper in water for two hours and then __17__ them into small pieces.
explanation: by soaking...and then tearing...，前後動名詞並列對等（both follow by），tearing 呼應前面的 soaking，維持句子結構一致。tear（原形）、tore（過去式）、torn（過去分詞）都不能接在 by 之後跟 soaking 並列。

sentence: Even the youngest children can learn to see implications __24__ the obvious.
explanation: beyond the obvious（超越表面所見）符合「看到言外之意」的語意，implications beyond the obvious 指「表面之外的深層含意」。near／among／without 都不符合這種「超越表象」的語意。

sentence: This is reading for deeper understanding, __25__ a thoughtful look at what lies beneath the surface.
explanation: 現在分詞 taking 引導分詞片語，補充說明「深度閱讀」這件事的具體內涵（用心觀察表面之下的東西），是對前面 reading 的同位補述。take（原形）、takes（限定動詞，句子已有主要動詞 is）、to take（不定詞語意不合）都不符合這個補述結構。

sentence: Outbreaks of avian influenza __27__ be devastating for the poultry industry and for farmers.
explanation: can be devastating 表示「可能具有毀滅性」，can 表達可能性；shall（將要，較正式且不合語境）、dare（敢）、need（需要）都不符合這裡描述禽流感可能造成之影響的語意。

sentence: Economic consequences are often most serious in developing countries __29__ poultry raising is an important source of income, and of food, for impoverished rural farmers and their families.
explanation: where 引導形容詞子句修飾地方先行詞 developing countries，表示「在那些國家（養禽業是重要收入來源）」。that 通常不直接引導完整地方子句、until（直到）、although（雖然）都不符合這裡「修飾地點」的語法功能。

sentence: __19__ suggestion made by the experts is to dip newspaper sheets in vinegar and water, and use them to clean windows, mirrors, and tiles.
explanation: Another suggestion（另一個建議）承接前文已提過的第一個建議（把報紙變成木炭），引出第二個建議，符合列點論述的邏輯。This／That 是指示前文剛提過的同一件事，不是「另一個」，Other 不能直接修飾單數名詞 suggestion。

sentence: Old papers can __20__ be used to line rubbish bins and as packing material when mailing breakable goods.
explanation: also（也）表示「舊報紙也可以被用來……」，承接前文列舉的其他用途，屬於累加式列點。soon（很快）、thus（因此）、rather（相當）都不符合這種「還可以用來做……」的累加語意。

sentence: Certainly, children must start with enjoyment __22__ their interest in poetry dies.
explanation: or 在此表達「否則」的邏輯（孩子必須先從享受樂趣開始，否則他們對詩的興趣就會消失），是「條件＋反面後果」的固定用法。and（並且）、so（所以）、then（然後）都不符合這種「不然就會……」的警示語氣。

sentence: __26__ all bird species are thought to be susceptible to infection, domestic poultry flocks are especially vulnerable to infections that can rapidly reach epidemic proportions.
explanation: While 在此表示讓步「雖然所有鳥類都被認為易受感染，家禽尤其特別脆弱」，帶出前後兩個群體之間的對比（所有鳥類 vs. 家禽特別容易爆發疫情）。Since（因為，因果）、Unless（除非）、Not（單純否定，文法上無法引導子句）都不符合這裡的讓步對比語意。

sentence: For example, an outbreak of avian influenza in the USA in 1983–1984 resulted in the destruction of more than 17 million birds __28__ nearly US$ 65 million.
explanation: 【句型】at a cost of + 金額，固定搭配，表示「花費……的代價」，說明撲殺1700萬隻禽鳥所付出的經濟代價。with a view to（為了）、in regard to（關於）、on account of（因為）都不符合這裡「付出金錢代價」的語意。

sentence: When outbreaks become widespread within a country, control can be extremely difficult. __30__, government authorities usually undertake aggressive emergency control measures as soon as an outbreak is detected.
explanation: 正因為疫情擴散後控制困難，「因此」政府通常會積極採取緊急防疫措施，Therefore 表順接因果。Instead（取而代之）、By no means（絕不）、On the contrary（相反地）都不符合這裡的因果邏輯。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: The man then took the worm out of the first jar and put it in the second jar __18__ contained alcohol and said to the audience, “Now watch the reaction.”
explanation: which 引導形容詞子句修飾先行詞 jar，並在子句中作主詞（那個罐子裝著酒精）。what 不能有先行詞、when／where 分別修飾時間／地點先行詞，皆不符合這裡修飾「罐子」這個物品先行詞的語法。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: The New Orleans Jazz and Heritage Festival, also called Jazz Fest, is a 10-day cultural feast __21__ thousands of musicians, cooks, and craftspeople welcome 500,000 visitors each year.
explanation: in which 引導形容詞子句修飾先行詞 feast，表示「在這個盛會中，音樂家、廚師、工匠們歡迎50萬名遊客」。such that／as many as／in order for 都不是能引導修飾 feast 的關係詞結構。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: The main events include unforgettable music on 12 stages, delicious Louisiana cuisine in two large food areas, and crafts artisans from the region and __22__ the world purchasing and selling their works.
explanation: artisans from the region and around the world並列，around the world（世界各地）呼應前面from the region（來自本地），表示工匠來源涵蓋在地與全球（此為官方確認修正：原誤植為across，正確答案為around）；against／about／across均不符合此處固定搭配。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: The evening concerts __23__ different locations during the 10-day Festival.
explanation: 【句型】be held at + 地點，固定搭配，表示「（活動）在……舉辦」，符合演唱會在不同地點舉行的語意。happen to（碰巧）、are taken in（被欺騙／被收留）、participate in（參與）都不符合這裡「舉辦於」的語意。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: Teams have been known to come from __27__ to win, but the chances of overcoming that kind of lead are slim.
explanation: 【運動慣用語】come from behind 固定用法，表示「從落後局面逆轉獲勝」，符合後文「扭轉這種領先差距的機會很渺茫」的語境。above／down／underneath 都不是這個慣用語的固定搭配。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: He displayed two jars in front of the group, one containing water and the other containing alcohol, __16__ a very healthy worm.
explanation: along with（連同）表示「和一條健康的蟲一起展示」，along with a very healthy worm 補充說明展示品還包括一條蟲。in addition 通常需搭配 to 或單獨作副詞使用、on account of（因為）、as a result of（由於）都不符合這裡「一併展示」的語意。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: The group watched closely __17__ the worm floated in the jar, dangling and swimming.
explanation: as 在此表示「當……的同時」，watched as the worm floated 表示一邊觀察一邊看著蟲漂浮游動的過程。if（如果）、yet（然而）、or（或者）都不符合這種「同時觀察」的語意。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: __28__ of us can be perfectly sure about how things will turn out in the future. But we can, and often do, think of the possibilities.
explanation: None of us can be perfectly sure（我們沒有人能完全確定）呼應後句「但」我們可以、也經常會去思考各種可能性，前後形成「無法確定／但仍會臆測」的對比。All／Some／Many 都無法帶出這種與後句 But 銜接的語意對比。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: We can try to guess __29__ this or that might happen.
explanation: whether 引導名詞子句作 guess 的受詞，表示「猜測是否會發生這件事或那件事」，whether...or... 是固定的「是否」句型。since／though／because 都不能引導這種作受詞的名詞子句。

year: 93年指考(敏督利颱風應變試題)
source: 93年指考敏督利颱風應變試卷
sentence: Which would you wear to a football game, a sweater or a raincoat? __26__ the raincoat if you thought there was a good chance of rain.
explanation: 這是省略句修辭，Probably 承接前一句的問句「你會穿什麼？」，省略了主詞和動詞（you would wear），直接以 Probably the raincoat 簡答「大概會穿雨衣」，符合口語化的簡答語氣。Formally（正式地）、Similarly（同樣地）、Consequently（因此）都不符合這種「簡答可能性」的語意。

sentence: __19__ by the multitude of information systems requiring complicated access, Berners-Lee fashioned a universal one that made information readily __20__ .
explanation: 過去分詞 Frustrated 放句首作分詞構句，省略了 Being，表被動語意（Berners-Lee 被許多複雜的資訊系統搞得很挫折）。Having frustrated（現在完成主動分詞，語意錯誤——人不會主動使某事挫折）、To be frustrated（不定詞不合句構）、Been frustrated（文法上不成立，分詞構句不能只用過去分詞的完成式殘缺形式）皆不合。

sentence: __19__ by the multitude of information systems requiring complicated access, Berners-Lee fashioned a universal one that made information readily __20__ .
explanation: 【句型】make + O + C，made information readily available 表示「使資訊容易取得」，呼應前文「設計一個統一系統」的目的。consistent（一致的）、important（重要的）、unforgettable（難忘的）都不符合「讓資訊容易存取」的語境。

sentence: The 7,000 pieces—full statues, heads and carved inscriptions—are breathtaking not only for their individual beauty, but also for __21__ they represent: a road map to the origins of much of Southeast Asian culture.
explanation: what 引導名詞子句作 for 的受詞，同時兼任 represent 的受詞，意思是「它們所代表的東西（即……的路線圖）」。which 需要明確先行詞、that 不能同時當介系詞受詞又當子句內受詞、when 語意不合，皆不符合。

sentence: But the collection is not in a museum, and it is not open __22__ visitors.
explanation: 【句型】open to + 對象，固定搭配，表示「對……開放」。with／by／among 都不是 open 表達「對誰開放」的正確搭配介系詞。

sentence: It is held in unknown, guarded warehouses __23__ only a few people can see it.
explanation: where 引導形容詞子句修飾地方先行詞 warehouses，表示「在那些倉庫裡，只有少數人能看到它」。which 需要子句中扮演主詞/受詞角色，此處子句已是完整句子不缺成分，故不合；until（直到）、unless（除非）都不符合修飾地點的語法功能。

sentence: He began his career as a zoologist, __28__ mollusks and their adaptations to their environment.
explanation: 現在分詞 studying 引導分詞片語，補充說明他身為動物學家時所做的事（研究軟體動物），與主要子句主詞 He 是主動關係。study（原形）、studied（過去式，不能單獨作分詞片語）、being studied（被動語態，語意錯誤——他是研究者不是被研究對象）皆不合。

sentence: __29__ age 21, he had already published 25 professional papers on that topic.
explanation: 【句型】By + 年齡/時間點，表示「到……歲時（已經）」，常搭配過去完成式 had already published，強調在某時間點之前已完成的事。In／With／On 都不是這種「時限之前」的固定搭配。

sentence: The cab went up on the footpath and __13__ stopped centimeters away from a shop window.
explanation: finally stopped（最終停了下來）表示計程車在驚險失控後，最終在距離櫥窗僅幾公分處停下，符合整段驚險過程後平息下來的敘事節奏（此為官方確認修正：原誤植為hardly，正確答案為finally）；hardly（幾乎不）與「有停下來」的事實矛盾，likely／mainly均不符合語境。

sentence: These innovations are readily recognizable by most Americans, have had a direct impact on our everyday lives, and may also dramatically affect our lives __18__ .
explanation: 承接前面「已經對生活產生直接影響」，這句延伸談論這些創新未來持續產生的影響，in the future（在未來）符合語境。for a moment（片刻）、at that time（在那時，指過去某時間點）、from then on（從那時起，需要明確過去時間點）都不符合這裡展望未來的語意。

sentence: __25__ very large pieces too heavy to move, virtually all surviving Angkorian statues, wood carvings and artifacts have been replaced with copies.
explanation: Except for（除了……之外）表示排除，「除了太重搬不動的大型文物外，幾乎所有現存的吳哥文物都已被複製品取代」，符合語意（因為搬不動，所以那些大型文物沒被換成複製品）。In spite of（儘管）、Owing to（因為）、In addition to（除了……還）都不符合這種「唯一的例外」語意。

sentence: If you've ever seen the Sean Connery movie Medicine Man, then the annual convention of wizards and witches will be familiar to you. __19__ , get prepared for the overwhelming attack of wizards and witches here.
explanation: 承接前句「如果你看過那部電影，這個巫師大會你會覺得很熟悉」，這句是條件對比的另一半：「如果沒看過，就做好心理準備」，If not（如果沒有）呼應前面的 If you've ever seen。If any／If ever／If only 都不符合這種「前後條件對比」的邏輯。

sentence: __12__ using any thermometer, double check that it covers the right temperature __13__ for your activity or experiment.
explanation: Before using（在使用……之前）表示「使用溫度計前，要先確認……」，符合操作步驟中「事前檢查」的邏輯順序。After（之後）、For（為了）、Without（沒有）都不符合這種「使用前先確認」的語意。

sentence: __12__ using any thermometer, double check that it covers the right temperature __13__ for your activity or experiment.
explanation: temperature range（溫度範圍）是固定搭配，表示溫度計所能偵測的溫度區間。record（紀錄）、system（系統）、unit（單位）都不符合「溫度計涵蓋範圍」的語意。

sentence: A garden thermometer, __14__ , will burst if you try to use it for boiling liquids.

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用)
sentence: It is the constant nearness of architecture during our life that has __17__ us in this way.
explanation: blinded us（使我們變得盲目／遲鈍）呼應全文主題——建築因與我們朝夕相處而讓我們對其美感變得視而不見；treated／guided／pleased均不符合此處「因熟悉而遲鈍」的語意。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用)
sentence: This false belief has strengthened in us until our eyes are __20__ and our minds are deadened to all the beauty that is being created around us today.
explanation: eyes are dulled（雙眼變得遲鈍）與後文minds are deadened（心智變得麻木）並列對應，表示我們對周遭美的感受力逐漸消失；pleased／justified／excited均不符合此處語意與並列結構。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: Cub Scouts, with the help of parents, build their own cars from wood, usually from kits __11__ a block of pine, plastic wheels, and metal axles.
explanation: 【句型】containing為現在分詞短語，修飾前面的kits（套件），表示「內含一塊松木、塑膠輪子與金屬車軸的套件」，kits與contain之間為主動關係（套件包含這些零件）；contain（原形動詞不能直接修飾名詞）、contained（過去分詞表被動，語意不合）、to contain（不定詞不符此處修飾語境）皆不符合。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: Murphy's son was too young to participate in the popular Soap Box Derby races, so he __12__ the idea of racing miniature wooden cars.
explanation: came up with the idea（想出這個點子）表示墨菲想出了讓孩子比賽木製迷你賽車的點子；dropped out（退出）、made out（辨認出／勉強應付）、put up with（忍受）均不符合此處語意。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: The Scout is given a block of wood made of pine __13__ two notches for wheels, four plastic wheels, and four nails.
explanation: a block of wood...with two notches（帶有兩個凹槽的木塊）表示童軍拿到的木塊上已鑿有兩個輪子用的凹槽，with在此表示「具有……特徵」；in／by／for均不符合此處的伴隨語意。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: Each __14__ is able to carve and decorate the car as he chooses.
explanation: Each scout（每位童軍）呼應全文主題Cub Scouts（幼童軍），表示每位童軍都能依自己喜好雕刻裝飾賽車；race（比賽）、master（團長）、parent（家長，但下文明確是男孩們自己動手）均不符合此處語意。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: The great thing about the race is that the boys build the cars with their dads, grandfathers, or __15__ they choose.
explanation: whomever they choose（無論他們選擇誰）表示男孩們可以和爸爸、爺爺或自己選擇的任何人一起打造賽車，whomever作為choose的受詞代名詞（指人）；whatever／whichever（指物）、wherever（指地方）均不符合此處指「人」的語意。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: Good manners make the social world easier to navigate. They provide guidelines to __16__ in times of uncertainty and reduce the chance of awkward exchanges.
explanation: guidelines to follow（可依循的準則）表示良好禮儀提供了在不確定情況下可依循的準則；confront（面對）、remove（移除）、lead（引導，但文法上lead the guidelines語意不通）均不符合此處語意搭配。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: A world __17__ good manners would be confusing and potentially confrontational.
explanation: a world without good manners（一個沒有良好禮儀的世界）表示假如世界缺乏良好禮儀，將會令人困惑甚至引發衝突；about／through／under均不符合此處語意。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: Good manners certainly connect people to their __18__ environment.
explanation: social environment（社會環境）表示良好禮儀能將人與其所處的社會環境連結起來，呼應後文a community and the people in it（群體與其中的人）；rural／clinical／mental均不符合此處語意。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: __19__ to adopt good manners sets people apart.
explanation: 【句型】Failing to adopt...為動名詞片語當主詞，fail to V表示「未能做到……」，指未能養成良好禮儀習慣的人會顯得與眾不同；Missing／Passing／Waiting均不符合此處fail to V的固定搭配語意。

source: 指考參考試卷(99課綱適用，102年施測)
sentence: We might forgive people who let their manners slip, but we'll feel more positive about and strongly connected to those who __20__.
explanation: those who don't（那些沒有這樣做的人）don't在此為助動詞構成的代動詞用法，代替前面省略的don't let their manners slip。全句與前文的who let their manners slip（禮儀失當的人）形成對比，表示相較於偶爾禮儀失當的人，我們對那些「始終保持禮貌、未曾失禮」的人感覺更正面、也更緊密相連；do／are／aren't均不符合此處的否定對比語意與動詞型態。
